title: 6 find and xargs Commands for Safer Batch File Actions
summary: Turn large file lists into safe batch operations with find and xargs commands for previews, deletes, moves, permission fixes, size inspection, and bulk compression.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with find and xargs

verification_setup: Confirm find and xargs are installed.
Create local sample files that match the example file patterns.
Create ./images-backup/ before running the move command.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/find_and_xargs_commands_for_safer_batch_file_actions.sh with local sample files and directories.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Spot-checked locally in a disposable temp directory with sample files covering preview, delete, move, chmod, listing, and CSV compression. Test file-changing commands on disposable files first.
